title: rubus holandrei
intro: Rubus holandrei, also known as the Hawaiian raspberry or Ma'o hau hele, is a species of raspberry native to Hawaii. The plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus holandrei include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve pain and inflammation, and protect against cell damage. Rubus holandrei can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for use in herbal remedies, and is also consumed fresh in salads or as a fruit.
